rationale: Radio-style checkbox for accompanying-document option 1. Enum: 'articles_of_nonprofit_conversion'.
Radio-style checkbox for accompanying-document option 2. Enum: 'statement_of_conversion'.
Radio-style checkbox for accompanying-document option 3. Enum: 'restated_articles_of_incorporation'.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the corporation is
rationale: Nonprofit corporation name.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The corporation is organized as a public benefit corporation for the following purpose or purposes
rationale: Checkbox for SECOND public-benefit option. Enum value: 'public_benefit'. Naming follows NP_MNPCA-6 convention.
Free-text public-benefit purpose statement (multiline text widget).

label_verbatim: SECOND: The corporation is organized as a mutual benefit corporation for all purposes permitted under 13-B MRSA, or, if not for all such purposes, then for the following purpose or purposes
rationale: Checkbox for SECOND mutual-benefit option. Enum value: 'mutual_benefit'.
Free-text mutual-benefit purpose statement (only if not 'all purposes permitted').
Checkbox for commercial-registered-agent path. Enum: 'commercial'.
CRA Public Number (commercial path).
Name (commercial path).
Checkbox for noncommercial-registered-agent path. Enum: 'noncommercial'.
Name (noncommercial path).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address.
Mailing address (optional).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: ...the initial board of directors of the corporation, if the number has been determined ... is ___
rationale: Initial directors count (used when fixed at filing). Naming follows NP_MNPCA-6.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The minimum number of directors (not less than 3) shall be ___
rationale: Minimum directors (range alternative). Right-side widget on the min/max line; mirrors MNPCA-6 Text14 layout.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: ...and the maximum number of directors shall be ___
rationale: Maximum directors. Left-side widget on the min/max line; mirrors MNPCA-6 Text15 layout (left-of-min visually wraps to next line at form width).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: There shall be no members.
rationale: Checkbox for 'no members' option. Boolean false. Naming follows NP_MNPCA-6 (boolean, not enum).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: There shall be one or more classes of members and the information required by 13-B MRSA §402 is attached.
rationale: Checkbox for 'has members' option. Boolean true.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: (Optional) ... No substantial part of the activities ... shall be the carrying on of propaganda ...
rationale: Boolean opt-in for SEVENTH (501(c)(3)-style limitation on lobbying and political campaigning). Naming follows NP_MNPCA-6.

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: (Optional) ... Other provisions ... are set out in Exhibit ___
rationale: Boolean opt-in for EIGHTH (other 501(c) or internal-affairs provisions attached as exhibit). Naming follows NP_MNPCA-6.
Exhibit letter for 501(c) provisions. Required when has_501c_exhibit is true.
